case_title: HOANG VAN LY VS. MATTHEW M. FREDERICK et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED FEB-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FREDERICK, MATTHEW M.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DANIEL V. MARK BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-21-2012 AT 8:30AM.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 3/21/12 TO MATTHEW M. FREDERICK, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LY, HOANG VAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FREDERICK, MATTHEW M. CLAIM AGAINST DANIEL V. MARK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,059.89 FILED BY LY, HOANG VAN AS TO DEFENDANT FREDERICK, MATTHEW M. MARK, DANIEL V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
